title: About us
metaDescription: Inocul8 is a health-tech leader dedicated to disease prevention. From vaccines to biologics, we provide quality, ethical, and affordable healthcare for all.
focusKeyword: Preventive healthcare services, SDG 3 health initiatives
html:
Inocul8 is a health-technology company offering preventive healthcare products and services to families and organizations across all sectors.

In line with the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 3, our objectives are:

  • To contribute our quota to ensuring healthy lives and promoting the well-being of all people of all ages by increasing access to safe, effective, quality, and affordable vaccines, biologics and disease prevention products.
  • To Foster health promotion and disease prevention in our local communities, especially among the undeserved.

To achieve our objectives, we anchor our services on these core values which every staff, officers, and volunteers MUST imbibe and align with:

Relationship: Building an amazing rapport with our clients and team members.

Integrity: To adhere strictly to ethical codes and conducts in rendering our services.

Trust: To earn the trust and confidence of our clients.

Innovation: Constant improvement in creative ways to solve problems.

Quality: We are built on a cultured understanding to deliver excellent services to our clients.

title: Hepatitis B Immunization
metaDescription: Protect your liver with Inocul8. We offer Hepatitis B testing and 3-dose vaccine packages in Nigeria to prevent liver cancer and cirrhosis. Book your appointment online today.
focusKeyword: Hepatitis B vaccine Nigeria Hepatitis B test price Lagos Hepatitis B vaccination schedule Hepatitis B prevention and treatment Liver cancer prevention vaccine
html:
Protect Your Liver. Protect Your Future.

Hepatitis B is a serious viral infection that attacks the liver and can lead to lifelong chronic illness, including liver cirrhosis and liver cancer. The good news is that it is highly preventable through timely vaccination.

At Inocul8, we prioritize Hepatitis B protection for both infants and adults, ensuring that this "silent" threat never gets a chance to compromise your health.

What are you protecting against? The Hepatitis B vaccine is specifically designed to prime your immune system to recognize and destroy the Hepatitis B Virus (HBV).

Chronic Liver Disease: Prevents the virus from causing long-term inflammation that leads to scarring of the liver (cirrhosis).

Liver Cancer: By preventing chronic HBV infection, this vaccine is effectively the world’s first "anti-cancer" vaccine.

Mother-to-Child Transmission: Crucial for protecting newborns from being infected during birth, which is the most common way chronic infections start. Silent Transmission: Since many people with HBV show no symptoms for years, vaccination ensures you are protected even if you unknowingly come into contact with the virus

Catch-Up Basic – ₦2,500

Hepatitis B Test Why start here

  • Know your Hepatitis B status
  • Required before vaccination
  • Quick and confidential How it’s done
  • Blood test Best first step if you’ve never tested before

Catch-Up Standard – ₦13,125

Hepatitis B Vaccination What it protects against

  • Chronic liver disease
  • Liver failure
  • Liver cancer Dose schedule
  • 3 doses:

○ Dose 1: Today ○ Dose 2: After 1 month ○ Dose 3: After 6 months Route

  • Injection (shot in the arm)

Best for long-term liver protection

Catch-Up Premium – ₦81,125

Hepatitis B + HPV Vaccination Double protection

  • Hepatitis B: Prevents liver cancer
  • HPV: Prevents cervical cancer, anal cancer, throat cancer, and genital warts Route
  • Injection Best for sexually active adults who want complete protection

title: Yellow Fever Travel Packages
metaDescription: Need a Yellow Fever card fast? Get your government-approved vaccination and official Yellow Card at Inocul8 in just 15 minutes. Avoid long queues and travel delays for only ₦50,000. Book your appointment now and travel with peace of mind!
focusKeyword: Fast Yellow Fever Card in Nigeria
html:
Need a Yellow Fever Card Fast? We’ve Got You.

Many countries require a government-approved Yellow Fever vaccination card before travel.

Long queues and delays can cost you time, money, and peace of mind.

Inocul8 gives you your vaccine and Yellow Card in as little as 15 minutes.

Terms and conditions apply.

  • Saves time and transport costs Vaccination + card collection in about 15 minutes Book now. Travel without delay.

Travel Premium – ₦70,000

Yellow Fever Vaccination + Official Yellow Card Who this is for

title: Yellow Fever Travel International Premium
metaDescription: Need a Yellow Fever certificate fast for international travel? Inocul8 provides official, WHO-compliant electronic Yellow Cards to meet global regulations. Our $250 Premium service ensures you're flight-ready without the wait. Get certified now!
focusKeyword: Yellow Fever Certificate for International Travel
html:
Need a Yellow Fever Certificate—Fast? We’ve Got You Covered.

Many countries require proof of Yellow Fever vaccination issued by an authorized provider before entry.

At Inocul8, we issue WHO-approved electronic Yellow Fever Certificates (e-Yellow Cards) that meet international travel regulations and are recognized at airports worldwide. Our process is secure, efficient, and designed to help you travel confidently—without unnecessary delays.

Get your official certificate and travel with complete peace of mind.

Terms and conditions apply.

title: myHealth Genital Warts
metaDescription: Living with genital warts can be stressful, but you aren’t alone. The myHealth package offers expert consultations, immune therapy, and lifestyle coaching to help you regain control and confidence. Book your guided care plan today.
focusKeyword: Genital warts treatment plan HPV management package How to clear genital warts Genital warts recurrence prevention HPV immune therapy
html:
Living with Genital Warts Can Be Stressful —  You’re Not Alone Genital warts can be uncomfortable and irritating.

They may go away and come back again, which can feel frustrating.

For many people, this affects sexual confidence, intimacy, and peace of mind.

Managing genital warts shouldn’t be a lonely journey.

myHealth Package — Your Partner in Genital Warts Care What myHealth gives you

  • Regular doctor consultations you can trust
  • Immune therapy that helps your body clear warts and reduce recurrence
  • Protection against high-risk HPV strains linked to cancers
  • Lifestyle coaching to support long-term control Why this matters
  • Genital warts need ongoing management, not guesswork
  • A guided plan reduces stress and repeat flare-ups
  • Honest care builds confidence again Book your myHealth Genital warts appointment today Care that supports your body — and your confidence.
